signals.message: Data Engineer session complete. M2 pipeline infrastructure delivered.
Designer session complete. M1 Design System fully delivered.
Log milestone completions for M3, M4, M5.
Data Engineer session complete. All M6 UI polish items implemented.
Backend Engineer session complete. M7+M8 fully implemented.
Tester approved M7 and M8. BUG-001 filed (medium). BUG-002 found and fixed.

PM session complete (2026-03-22). Log the following events: (1) M7 (Auth System) — marked COMPLETE, tester_approved. (2) M8 (Admin CMS) — marked COMPLETE, tester_approved. (3) BUG-001 assigned to Backend Engineer (ClipForm score range fix). (4) BUG-002 closed — fixed by Tester (ClipCard 'use client'). (5) Phase advanced from 5-launch to 7-marketing. (6) M9 (Marketing Materials) now active — Marketer is working on it. Update activity-log.md with all these events. Update shared-knowledge.md: 9 milestones complete (M0–M8), current phase 7-marketing, live at https://seeneyu.vercel.app.

PM context window is at ~90% — session restart is imminent. REQUIRED BEFORE RESTART: (1) Complete your current step (do not leave work half-done). (2) Update your progress/checkpoint file in .shared/outputs/<your-role>/. (3) Write a "checkpoint-saved" signal to pm.json listing what you finished and what is next. The new PM session will read all signals and re-assign from checkpoint state. Your .shared/outputs/<role>/progress.json is the source of truth for recovery.

SESSION END 2026-03-23. Next session tasks: (1) Log M10–M13 completions in activity-log.md AFTER Tester signs off on each (wait for PM approval signals). (2) Update shared-knowledge.md: current phase is 10-personalization, routes added: /practice /onboarding /dashboard. (3) Log the 5-point user product feedback session as a product decision in decisions.json. (4) Write milestone reports for M10, M11, M12, M13 once tester_approved=true.

Backend Engineer M10 session complete. Deliverables: BUG-001 fix (ClipForm score ranges), schema script field, types update, feedback API enhancement (character context + steps + no-frames fallback), CharacterBanner component, ScriptPanel component, ActionPlan in feedback page, ClipForm script textarea, tailwind fade-in-up animation. Build: 0 TS errors. Awaiting user db:push + Data Engineer script seeding to be fully live.

NEW MILESTONES TO DOCUMENT: M14 and M15.
